posts.text:
TOMORROW!! Live with Senator Warren - click here to subscribe to the Substack and get an alert when we are live - it’ll be about 1120am ET, WHAT ARE YOUR ?s

substack.com/@vspehar?liv...

Are they able to diminish or nullify Gay Marriage rights? Yes.. here’s how - and what my wife Natalie and I did to prepare.

youtu.be/hOhIHdmnBM0?...

I wonder if my great great grandpa dreamed when he escaped the Black & Tans and set forth to America… that 174 years later his descendant would be explaining WHY WE DONT FUCK WITH FASCISTS AND ZEALOTS TO A BUNCH OF WHITE FOLKS WHO WANT A KING AND STATE SPONSORED COMPULSARY RELIGION - STILL!!!!

Misery For Profit. Trumps sweetheart deal with private prisons to incarcerate more people than ever before 

youtu.be/qrCxHeOjkDA?...

Trumps plan to destroy Dept of Education - all the details 

youtu.be/wTD_2Y0xAEQ?...
One of the great privileges of college is testing the boundaries of society and learning what you value in a sheltered place. Leave the kids alone -
I said what I said 😂

“He would call him Little Marco. And Marco Rubio has in fact gotten a little part when it comes to Trump’s State Department.”
@underthedesknews.bsky.social on Trump sidelining Rubio when it comes to Ukraine and the Middle East.
open.substack.com/pub/underthe... Join at this link!
Ben Wickler for DNC chair! #news #democrats #leadership #fight

Here it is - what it was like in the week leading up to TikToks blackout, the indignant response from Biden team that he had “done all he can” - I’ll have a YouTube explainer with even more detail in the coming days. Tiktok is still not “saved” - far from it. Gift Link: wapo.st/4ax8ffP
What’s your over/under guesses on how many rounds it’ll take to get a Speaker of the House tomorrow? I say we go at least 3 rounds -
Headed to DC one last time for the year.. maybe the next 4 years 😂
They deleted his Instagram account - but not before I got these screenshots of his only story highlight. WHAT DOES IT MEAN? #luigi
I saw MVP today and she said pray for the haters… who could nevaaaaaa look this good in natural lighting 💅
Helloooooooo all my TikTok followers 🫶 are skies bluer here??

#TiktokBan what to know:
-A Peter Thiel backed rep championed legislation to give the President the power to ban “foreign adversary owned” apps
-TikTok sued claiming Citizens United gives them 1A rights 
-A DC court found it DOES NOT 
-Ban takes effect Jan 19 UNLESS
-Biden grants a 90 day extension
2025 - no time for smugness, or faux niceties just like - talk normal. We are tired.

There’s always a tweet 😂 this one was from last November about the Destiny/Fuentes situation (though I’m not sure Jarad knew literal allegations of being in bed together would come out) @taylorlorenz.bsky.social
10 Years of Trump: A Retrospective, Part One. Christian extremism, public privatization, and "a plot against equality" toward authoritarianism
Live with V Spehar & Jen Psaki

The Rise of ‘AI Man Camps’: How Some Companies Are Profiting from Data Centers AND Immigrant Detention Facilities. Target Hospitality Corp is speed running the entire “pain for profit” routine in real time

Voice of America SAVED! Iran, The Shield & Cuban Independence.. NOT looking so good. I've been on the road doing IRL work for the last two weeks, here's the TLDR on what's been going on and what to look out for this week.

The 37th GLAAD Media Awards: the Melancholy, the Joy and the Celebration. Love was in the air, but so was tension often broken by the realness of Laverne Cox, Liza Minnelli, and the hope that storytelling can create change.
Bananas & Sour Grapes: A Sort of Mixed Bag Recap on GOOD (and BAD) News From the Primaries Yesterday
Steve Bannon: The Leni Riefenstahl of the MAGA Movement. Steve Bannon is everywhere and he is nowhere. And he is ruining America.
LIVE: Melania Trump, Epstein — and the Photographer in Between. A recording from V Spehar and Tara Palmeri's live video

WEEKEND CATCH-UP: Trump accidentally kills Iranian leadership HE wanted, Bombshell Epstein updates, German Neo-Nazi party loses extremist designation, and more. News from a weekend that felt like it was a million years long
Epstein Files Update: Where Are the Trump Records? | LIVE at 12pm EST. A recording from V Spehar and Tara Palmeri's live video
The Predators Caught in the Web of The Widow Kirk

Rough Weekend to be a Kid. A woman went into labor in a Texas detention center, and several high schoolers got sent to kid prison after an off duty police chief showed up to put a chokehold on one of them for protesting ICE.
Five Bullets, with Elliot Wilson
Epstein Class Accountability
Jen Jenkins > Randy Fine: FLORIDA VOTES

We have something new for you… if you like news or quizzes, but especially if you like both. Can you beat @davejorgenson1 and @underthedesknews? 

Watch the full episode on @CNN’s YouTube channel.
It’s not cute I think we will have elections. We will!  So please check your registration and make a plan to vote! @brennancenter can help sort law from lie
Call your reps - no war! More dead soldiers reported today - NO WAR
“Mistakes will happen” THIS WHOLE THING IS A MISTAKE - no war! @cnn @cnnthismorning
The administration will lie, the lies will get bigger and more frequent.
@democracyforward suing AGAIN because Trump/Vance admin is STILL unconstitutionally targeting schools and terrorizing the good people of #minnesota #democracyforwardpartner

Gas prices, draft talk and memes: our panel breaks down how Americans are reacting to the Iran war — and the growing questions about what the endgame is and who decides when it’s over. #iran #usa #war #lifestyle #gasprices #military
UPDATE - all good at DCA now - Local News now saying it may be a “suspicious package” in a break room?

Pete also just announced he’s going to cute LAWYERS AND MILITARY JUDGES DOWN to just Trump friendly ones - bc - he doesn’t want the law getting in the way of MILITARY LETHALITY. Photos don’t lie… but someone at the Pentagon sure does a lot 🙄
The dumbest people making the biggest most catastrophic choices.
It’s not cute I think we will have elections. We will!  So please check your registration and make a plan to vote! @Brennan Center for Justice can help sort law from lie
Call your reps - no war. More dead soldiers reported today 🥺NO WAR
“Mistakes will happen” THIS WHOLE THING IS A MISTAKE @CNN
The administration will lie, the lies will get bigger and more frequent.
#duet with @Dr. Lori #drlori #goodnews
Democracy Forward is suing AGAIN because Trump/Vance admin is STILL unconstitutionally targeting schools and terrorizing the good people of #minnesota @democracyfwd
Photos don’t lie… but someone at the Pentagon sure does a lot 🙄
We can’t let these people distract us from the stories that are impacting everyday Americans - republicans are fracturing away from Trump and crashing out - they won’t take us with them!
The dumbest people making the biggest most catastrophic choices.
